Uses of Class
org.greenbytes.http.sfv.ByteSequenceItem

    • Uses of ByteSequenceItem in org.greenbytes.http.sfv

      Methods in org.greenbytes.http.sfv that return ByteSequenceItem 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static ByteSequenceItem Parser.parseByteSequence​(String input)
      Implementation of "Parsing a Byte Sequence" (assuming no extra characters left in input string)
      static ByteSequenceItem ByteSequenceItem.valueOf​(byte[] value)
      Creates a ByteSequenceItem instance representing the specified byte[] value.
